name: Coffee Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the water and sugar until fully dissolved.
2. Turn off the heat and slowly add the dry instant coffee while continuing to stir.
3. Add chopped vanilla beans to a separate container of vodka.
4. Combine the cooled sugar syrup with the coffee solution.
5. Mix this mixture with the vodka in another container.
6. Cover tightly and shake vigorously each day for 3 weeks.
7. Strain and filter the liqueur before serving.
